title: Diary of a Butterfly
subTitle: Gul, an aspiring model, wants to be successful in the fashion industry and decides to achieve her dream by any means necessary. However, she soon realises that it comes at a price.

title: Buddha Mar Gaya
subTitle: A self-made industrialist dies as his company is on the brink of success. With the launch of the IPO, the deceased's family agrees to conceal his death until all shares are sold.

title: Unnaruge Naan Irundhal
subTitle: A taxi driver's life changes after he meets Mahalakshmi, a girl who is financially indebted to many. While they grow closer to each other, his encounter with his favourite actor threatens their love.

title: Diary of a Butterfly
subTitle: Gul, an aspiring model, wants to be successful in the fashion industry and decides to achieve her dream by any means necessary. However, she soon realises that it comes at a price.

title: Hostel
subTitle: Karan, a freshman, goes to live in a hostel and becomes a victim of ragging. After facing severe humiliation, he musters the courage to fight his perpetrators and also sets out to punish them.

title: Lajja
subTitle: Trapped within the confines of a male-dominated society, four courageous women fight their battles, each unrelated yet resonant with the others.

title: Omkara
subTitle: Ishwar dreams of becoming Omkara's successor after the latter wins the election. However, when Omkara appoints Keshav as his lieutenant, he feels betrayed and plots revenge.

title: EMI: Liya Hai to Chukana Padega
subTitle: Sattar Bhai runs a collection agency called Good Luck Recovery in Mumbai's Bhendi Bazar area. Famous for his notoriety, he uses unconventional methods to make four defaulters repay their debts.

title: Unakkaga Ellam Unakkaga
subTitle: Sakthivel, an irresponsible man, disapproves of the marriage arranged for him by his father and tries to ruin it. However, he is surprised to learn that the prospective bride is the woman he loves.

title: Shamitabh
subTitle: A mute man who dreams of becoming an actor and a man come together for a purpose, but their differences cause them to drift apart due to their egos.

title: No Smoking
subTitle: A man, stricken by nicotine addiction, checks himself into a rehabilitation centre. However, this decision causes a chain reaction of unfortunate events and alters the trajectory of his life.

title: Dil Ke Peeche Peeche
subTitle: Vanraj, a naval officer, lives with his family in Delhi. However, things get complicated when his sister-in-law comes into his life.

title: Love Sex Aur Dhoka
subTitle: A series of unfortunate events unfolds when security equipment and hidden cameras expose the actions of three individuals loosely connected to one another.

title: Dil Ke Peeche Peeche
subTitle: Vanraj, a naval officer, lives with his family in Delhi. However, things get complicated when his sister-in-law comes into his life.

title: Vighnaharta Shree Siddhivinayak
subTitle: Successful businessman Manav Mehta bears a huge loss in his business when his personal life is in turmoil. To overcome his problems he must seek blessings from Shree Siddhivinayak.

subTitle: A mute man who dreams of becoming an actor and a man come together for a purpose, but their differences cause them to drift apart due to their egos.

title: Gulzar Dil
subTitle: Cheenu pretends to fall in love with Maya as part of a challenge. However, he eventually falls for her for real, and they must overcome family obstacles to be together.

title: Maqbool
subTitle: Maqbool, an underworld don's henchman, falls in love with his boss's mistress, Nimmi, who instigates him to kill the don and become the next leader.

title: Maine Pyar Kyun Kiya?
subTitle: Sameer lies to his girlfriend, Sonia, about being in an unhappy marriage. However, when he falls in love with her, she asks to meet his estranged wife, putting him in a predicament.

title: Kuku Mathur Ki Jhand Ho Gayi
subTitle: Best friends Kuku and Ronnie spend most of their time together. However, when Ronnie gets busy running his family's business, Kuku tries to get him back through improper ways.

title: Paagalpan
subTitle: Sameer, the son of an industrialist, and Roma, a girl struggling to build a career, fall in love. However, their love is tested when their families disapprove of their relationship.
